file_insights.purpose: HTTP server integration test for bop serve endpoint
key_components: repo_root() - calculates workspace root from CARGO_MANIFEST_DIR
find_free_port() - obtains OS-assigned free port via TcpListener
wait_for_server() - polls server readiness with timeout
send_http_request() - raw HTTP/1.1 POST request builder
ServerGuard - RAII wrapper for process cleanup

patterns_discovered.name: Compile-time path resolution
patterns_discovered.description: Uses env!("CARGO") and env!("CARGO_MANIFEST_DIR") macros to bake paths at compile time
patterns_discovered.context: Addresses stale path issue from 2026-03-01 memory - provides fallback to runtime discovery

patterns_discovered.name: Server lifecycle management
patterns_discovered.description: ServerGuard struct wraps Child process with Drop impl for guaranteed cleanup
patterns_discovered.benefit: Ensures server process killed even if test panics

patterns_discovered.name: Port availability polling
patterns_discovered.description: find_free_port() binds random port, then wait_for_server() polls with 100ms intervals
patterns_discovered.benefit: Avoids hardcoded ports and race conditions

patterns_discovered.name: OS timing accommodation
patterns_discovered.description: Sleep 200ms after port release to allow OS to fully release socket
patterns_discovered.context: Handles OS delay in TIME_WAIT state cleanup

patterns_discovered.name: Raw HTTP protocol handling
patterns_discovered.description: Manual HTTP/1.1 request formatting and response reading without client library
patterns_discovered.tradeoff: Zero external HTTP client dependency vs. more verbose code

gotchas_discovered.name: Stale binary paths
gotchas_discovered.description: repo_root() calculation via unwrap().parent().unwrap() assumes exact directory structure
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Tested; structure is stable in workspace

gotchas_discovered.name: Server startup timeout
gotchas_discovered.description: 10-second timeout for server readiness may fail on heavily loaded systems
gotchas_discovered.context: Memory notes syspolicyd can reach 99% CPU on new binaries

gotchas_discovered.name: Port release race condition
gotchas_discovered.description: TCP socket remains in TIME_WAIT after drop, requires sleep before reuse
gotchas_discovered.evidence: Explicit 200ms sleep added before server startup

gotchas_discovered.name: Missing auth token test
gotchas_discovered.description: Test does not validate BOP_SERVE_TOKEN authentication mentioned in memory

approach_outcome.test_coverage: Basic HTTP server functionality validated: startup, POST /cards/new, HTTP 201 response, pending/ directory creation
approach_outcome.completeness: Smoke test only - covers happy path but not error cases, auth, or concurrent requests
approach_outcome.robustness: Handles process cleanup, port conflicts, and timeout scenarios appropriately

recommendations.suggestion: Extract http_request_helpers into shared test module if multiple integration tests emerge
recommendations.reasoning: Avoid duplication as serve endpoint tests expand

recommendations.suggestion: Add test variant for BOP_SERVE_TOKEN authentication validation
recommendations.reasoning: Memory mentions optional BOP_SERVE_TOKEN auth - should verify protection works

recommendations.suggestion: Add negative case tests: malformed JSON, missing card fields, concurrent requests
recommendations.reasoning: Current test only validates success path; error handling untested

recommendations.suggestion: Consider extracting timeout constants (10s, 200ms) to module-level consts for tunability
recommendations.reasoning: CI environments may need different timeout thresholds than local development
